div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Minister in Panama (South)
div.p: 52. Associated Press despatch from Panama dated June 22, states that a resolution recommending common action by Pan American states against any aggressor state has been unanimously adopted by the Bolívar Congress.

Please report fully. In this connection refer to Department’s telegram 33, April 24, 2 p.m. 1925, your 50, April 28, 3 p.m. 1925, Department’s 320, June 17, 1925, your 854, October 31, 1925,Last two telegrams not printed. and further correspondence regarding assurance of Panaman Government that the Congress is purely ceremonial.
